user.title: Set up TNEB Tariff Calculator
user.description: Enter the date and reading of an actual meter reading you took (ideally the start of a billing cycle). Future bimonthly cycle boundaries are calculated forward from this date.

data.name: Name
data.source_sensor: Raw energy sensor (cumulative kWh, always increasing)
data.initial_reading_date: Date of the initial meter reading
data.initial_reading_value: Meter reading on that date (kWh, optional)
data.cycle_months: Billing cycle length in months (2 = bimonthly)
data.fixed_charge: Fixed / service charge (optional, added on top)
